mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.batch_code, DATE_FORMAT(b.entry_date,'%Y-%m-%d') as entry_date, b.breed, b.source, b.notes, p.pen_name as initial_pen_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE batch_id = b.id) as total_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE batch_id = b.id AND status = 'SOLD') as sold_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM immunization_records ir WHERE ir.ear_tag IN (SELECT ear_tag FROM animals WHERE batch_id = b.id)) as immunization_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medication_records mr WHERE mr.ear_tag IN (SELECT ear_tag FROM animals WHERE batch_id = b.id)) as medication_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pen_transfer_records ptr WHERE ptr.ear_tag IN (SELECT ear_tag FROM animals WHERE batch_id = b.id)) as transfer_count FROM batches b LEFT JOIN pens p ON b.initial_pen_id = p.id WHERE b.batch_code = #{batchCode}

SELECT a.id, a.ear_tag, a.gender, DATE_FORMAT(a.entry_date,'%Y-%m-%d') as entry_date, a.breed, a.batch_id, a.current_pen_id, a.birth_weight, a.status, b.batch_code, p.pen_name as current_pen_name FROM animals a LEFT JOIN batches b ON a.batch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN pens p ON a.current_pen_id = p.id WHERE a.batch_id = (SELECT id FROM batches WHERE batch_code = #{batchCode}) ORDER BY a.ear_tag
